author: kevboh
description: Helps you write and edit novels, screenplays, and other long projects.

manifest.author: Kevin Barrett
manifest.description: Write novels, screenplays, and other long projects in Obsidian.
manifest.name: Longform

name: Longform

releases.author: kevboh
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* wrap scene text by @chrisgrieser in https://github.com/kevboh/longform/pull/239
* Fix typos by @deining in https://github.com/kevboh/longform/pull/241
* ci: bump GitHub action workflows by @deining in https://github.com/kevboh/longform/pull/242
* add prettier config by @kevboh in https://github.com/kevboh/longform/pull/248
* feat: use `tab` / `shift-tab` to move in Suggestion Modals by @chrisgrieser in https://github.com/kevboh/longform/pull/253
* Filter ignoredFiles before attempting to map them. by @danhanly in https://github.com/kevboh/longform/pull/290
* fix: resolve sync issues with optional wait and fallback by @Baysen in https://github.com/kevboh/longform/pull/286
* Updated theme to appear more like a native part of Obsidian by @hannahildebrandt in https://github.com/kevboh/longform/pull/291
* feat: create "Add Frontmatter" compile step  by @digyx in https://github.com/kevboh/longform/pull/280

## New Contributors
* @deining made their first contribution in https://github.com/kevboh/longform/pull/241
* @danhanly made their first contribution in https://github.com/kevboh/longform/pull/290
* @Baysen made their first contribution in https://github.com/kevboh/longform/pull/286
* @hannahildebrandt made their first contribution in https://github.com/kevboh/longform/pull/291
* @digyx made their first contribution in https://github.com/kevboh/longform/pull/280

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/kevboh/longform/compare/2.0.7...2.1.0

releases.author: kevboh
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* track word count after meeting goal by @MadCatMagic in https://github.com/kevboh/longform/pull/234
* fix some deprecations
* fix regression in 2.0.6 that broke scene creation on Windows (#235)


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/kevboh/longform/compare/2.0.6...2.0.7

releases.author: kevboh
releases.description:
- fix scene context menu, rename links alongside renamed scenes
- prevent illegal scene names in windows
- add a `data-scene-status` attribute to scene entries if they have a `status` property

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/kevboh/longform/compare/2.0.5...2.0.6

releases.author: kevboh
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* allow alternative compiled extensions, fixes #203 by @kevboh in https://github.com/kevboh/longform/pull/205
* default to Scenes tab on initial open for MSs by @kevboh in https://github.com/kevboh/longform/pull/206
* add GUI for ignoring scenes by @b-camphart in https://github.com/kevboh/longform/pull/209
* docs: add link to custom-compile-step community repo by @chrisgrieser in https://github.com/kevboh/longform/pull/223
* prevent null selectedDraft from breaking render by @b-camphart in https://github.com/kevboh/longform/pull/219
* docs: typo about $3{#} by @wesleyboar in https://github.com/kevboh/longform/pull/228

## New Contributors
* @chrisgrieser made their first contribution in https://github.com/kevboh/longform/pull/223
* @wesleyboar made their first contribution in https://github.com/kevboh/longform/pull/228

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/kevboh/longform/compare/2.0.4...2.0.5

releases.author: kevboh
releases.description:
- Support templates for new scenes
- Add compile commands
- Sundry bug fixes

Thanks to @b-camphart for so much help here!

releases.author: kevboh
releases.description: Fix bug with scene creation counting as unknown.

releases.author: kevboh
releases.description: Better frontmatter handling, "add all"/"ignore all", filesystem hook fixes.

releases.author: kevboh
releases.description: Release of Longform 2.0. See [this migration guide](https://github.com/kevboh/longform/blob/main/docs/MIGRATING_FROM_VERSION_1_TO_2.md) for going from version 1.x to version 2.0. See README for features.

releases.author: kevboh
releases.description: Adds support for the revamped [compile](https://github.com/kevboh/longform/blob/8f465a1247400f4afd0f3a6ea2c383f3d52e7d27/docs/COMPILE.md) feature.

releases.author: kevboh
releases.description: - Update the way metadata is patched, fixes [#15](https://github.com/kevboh/longform/issues/15) and possibly [#9](https://github.com/kevboh/longform/issues/9).

releases.author: kevboh
releases.description:
- Small refactor to make metadata sync more reliable.
- Update index file template to link to more info on how the index file works.
- Add a note about the Templater issue in the README.
